name: GETTY REALTY CORP /MD/
summary: Getty Realty Corp. (NYSE: GTY) is a Maryland-based, publicly traded net lease REIT specializing in the acquisition, financing, and development of convenience stores, express tunnel car washes, automotive service centers, drive-thru quick service restaurants, and other single tenant retail real estate. As of December 31, 2025, the company owned or leased 1,174 properties across 44 states and Washington, D.C., leasing them primarily under triple-net lease agreements to convenience store operators, petroleum distributors, car wash operators, and other automotive and retail tenants.

products.name: Triple-Net Lease Properties
products.description: Net lease agreements for convenience stores, car washes, automotive centers, and quick service restaurants with 15-20 year initial terms.

products.name: Property Acquisitions
products.description: Acquisition of single tenant retail real estate including convenience stores and automotive service properties.

products.name: Development Funding
products.description: Funding advances for construction of new-to-industry retail assets such as car washes and quick service restaurants.

products.name: ATM Equity Program
products.description: At-the-market equity program used to raise capital through forward sales agreements for common stock.

products.name: Senior Unsecured Notes
products.description: Private placement debt instrument; $250M issued at 5.76% fixed rate due January 22, 2036.
